en_title: Fortnite Begins Reselling Old Battle Pass Skins in Next Update
cn_title: 《堡垒之夜》下个更新开始复售旧战斗通行证皮肤
subtitle: 老兵回归，双赢策略
opus_summary: 《堡垒之夜》下个更新将复售旧战斗通行证皮肤，首批回归的是绝对毁灭赛季的漫威角色。此前限时独占政策终结，新玩家也能入手旧皮肤。战斗通行证售价10美元(约合人民币68元)，远低于单买皮肤，对Epic和玩家是双赢。

paragraphs.en: Fortnite will begin reselling content from old battle passes as part of its next update.
paragraphs.cn: 《堡垒之夜》将在下一次更新中开始重新出售旧战斗通行证中的内容。

paragraphs.en: The scheme will start off with skins from Chapter 5 Season 4: Absolute Doom, which was Fortnite's most recent Marvel-dedicated season that ran from August 16 to November 2, 2024.
paragraphs.cn: 该计划将从第五章第四赛季「绝对毁灭」的皮肤开始，这是《堡垒之夜》最近的漫威主题赛季，于2024年8月16日至11月2日期间举行。

paragraphs.en: This included Marvel characters such as Doctor Doom, Mysterio, Shuri, War Machine, Gwenpool and Emma Frost, as well as a Captain America version of Fortnite character Jonesy. All are now expected to imminently return via Fortnite's in-game shop.
paragraphs.cn: 其中包括毁灭博士、神秘客、苏睿、战争机器、格温侍和艾玛·弗罗斯特等漫威角色，以及《堡垒之夜》角色琼斯的美国队长版本。所有这些皮肤预计很快就会通过《堡垒之夜》游戏内商店重新上架。

paragraphs.en: Fortnite previously pledged to never resell content released as part of its time-limited battle passes, a policy that made them must-have purchases at the time, but ultimately served to only lock newer players out of characters released years ago.
paragraphs.cn: 《堡垒之夜》此前曾承诺永不出售限时战斗通行证中的内容，这一政策让战斗通行证在当时成为必购品，但最终却导致新玩家无法获得多年前发布的角色。

paragraphs.en: As Fortnite edges closer to its 10th birthday, Epic Games decided to drop this policy from 2024 onwards, beginning with the Ultimate Doom season — though still said that battle pass content would not be sold separately for 18 months. (And, of course, the price of a season pass remains far less than the cost of buying all of its characters separately, with battle passes selling for around $10 — about the same price in V-Bucks for some individual skins.)
paragraphs.cn: 随着《堡垒之夜》逐渐临近十周年，Epic Games 决定从2024年起放弃这项政策，首先从「终极毁灭」赛季开始——不过当时仍表示战斗通行证内容在18个月内不会单独出售。（当然，赛季通行证的价格仍然远低于单独购买所有角色的总费用，战斗通行证售价约10美元(约合人民币68元)(约合72元人民币)，大致相当于某些单个皮肤在V币中的价格。）

paragraphs.en: Of course, that 18 month time period has now lapsed for the Absolute Doom season — and fans had been wondering when it would reappear. Now, in a teaser released via X/Twitter, Epic Games has shown the vault doors opening back to this content, which fans have reacted positively towards.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，对于「绝对毁灭」赛季来说，18个月的期限现在已经过去——粉丝们也在猜测这些内容何时会重新出现。如今，Epic Games 在X/Twitter上发布了一段预告视频，展示了重新开启相关内容宝库大门的画面，粉丝们对此反应积极。

paragraphs.en: While a major change in policy, the practice of selling newer battle pass content is likely a win-win for Epic Games. It gets to re-monetize characters individually at a huge markup, and players don't feel FOMO to buy battle passes at the time.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管这是一项重大的政策转变，但出售较新战斗通行证内容的做法对Epic Games来说很可能是双赢。Epic能够以高额溢价单独重新变现这些角色，而玩家也不会再因为害怕错过而需要在当期就入手战斗通行证。

paragraphs.en: It's a typically busy time for Fortnite, with its next update rolling out tomorrow loaded with additions, before Epic Games departs for its annual two-week summer break. Other content coming to the game over the next fortnight includes a major collaboration with popstar Olivia Rodrigo, and a crossover with Neopets.
paragraphs.cn: 现在是《堡垒之夜》一贯的繁忙时期，明天将推出的下一个更新包含大量新增内容，之后 Epic Games 将开启为期两周的夏季休假。在接下来的两周内，游戏将迎来其他内容，包括与流行歌手 Olivia Rodrigo 的大规模合作，以及与《尼奥宠物》(Neopets)的联动。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: [MANUAL_TRANSLATION_REQUIRED] Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
